steps.title: Identify two points on the scatterplot
steps.content:
From the scatterplot, the points (2,0) and (4,10) lie on the trend shown by the data.
$$(2,0)$$
$$(4,10)$$

steps.title: Calculate the average rate of change
steps.content:
The slope between these points is
$$m=\frac{10-0}{4-2}= \frac{8}{2}=5$$
Because the data appear linear, this slope equals the average rate of change over any interval, including from $x=5$ to $x=7$.
Thus the average rate of change is $5^\circ\text{C}$ per minute.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
